name: Executor
description: Safe Python execution (AST Sandbox), system control, and file management. Absorbs AutoCoder.

commands.run_python_code: Execute Python safely in AST sandbox.
commands.get_battery_status: Device battery level and charging state.
commands.read_file: Read a file content by line range.
commands.write_file: Write or create a file (overwrite or append).
commands.patch_file: Surgically replace a text block inside a file.

function.name: EXECUTOR__run_python_code
function.description: Executes a block of Python code safely inside a strict AST sandbox. Use for math, data manipulation, and algorithm building. File system and network access are blocked.

function.name: EXECUTOR__execute_shell_command
function.description: Runs a raw shell command (cmd.exe on Windows, bash on Linux). Use for operations not covered by other tools. Output is truncated at 2000 chars.

function.name: EXECUTOR__get_time
function.description: Returns the current local date and time.

function.name: EXECUTOR__get_date
function.description: Returns today's date in a human-readable format.

function.name: EXECUTOR__get_battery_status
function.description: Returns the device battery percentage and whether it is charging.

function.name: EXECUTOR__list_processes
function.description: Lists the top running processes on the system, ordered by CPU usage.

function.name: EXECUTOR__kill_process
function.description: Terminates a running process by its name (e.g. 'notepad.exe').

function.name: EXECUTOR__reboot_system
function.description: Restarts the entire Hecos system (tray app + web server). Use only when explicitly asked.

function.name: EXECUTOR__read_file
function.description: Reads the contents of a local file. Use start_line and end_line to limit output for large files.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the file to read.

end_line.description: Last line to read (inclusive). Use -1 for the full file. Default: -1.

function.name: EXECUTOR__write_file
function.description: Writes or creates a file at the specified path. Mode 'w' overwrites; 'a' appends. Parent directories are created automatically. System paths are protected.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the file to write or create.

content.description: The full text content to write.

function.name: EXECUTOR__patch_file
function.description: Replaces the FIRST occurrence of old_text with new_text inside a file. Use this for surgical code/text edits instead of rewriting the whole file. Returns an error with a file preview if old_text is not found.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the file to patch.

old_text.description: The exact text block to find and replace (whitespace must match exactly).

function.name: EXECUTOR__delete_file
function.description: Deletes a file at the specified path. Cannot delete directories. System paths are protected.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the file to delete.

function.name: EXECUTOR__create_dir
function.description: Creates a directory and all intermediate parent directories if they do not exist.

directory_path.description: Absolute path to the directory to create.

function.name: EXECUTOR__list_dir
function.description: Lists the files and subdirectories inside a given directory.

directory_path.description: Absolute path to the directory to list.
